Romanticism is a belief in unguided passions as a way towards higher spiritual attainment. Often associated with a belief in salvation through nationalism ([[romantic nationalism]]), or through infatuation ([[Romance|romantic relationships]]). It may be the most prominent hydroplaning in Western culture. The solution is to pursue guided passions through mysticism within the Church.<ref>https://evolution.faith/hydroplaning/</ref>

It may be the most ubiquitous and harmful [[Hydroplane]] in existence today.

== References ==

[[Category:Hydroplanes]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Romanticism]][[sn:Romanticism]][[Category:Romanticism]]
[[Category:Git synced pages']]
[[sn:Romanticism]][[Category:Pseudo religious ideologies]]
[[Category:Pages]]
